creator: otacilio.neto@bsd.com.br
text:
Hello.

I aprove the patch.

Thanks a lot.

On 24/12/2011 20:00, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/flexdock,
>
> Please note that PR ports/163594 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/163594
